purpose: Product against backdrop of city skyline emerging from fog. Epic, urban-aspirational.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Cinematic urban landscape photography of {product_descriptor} in foreground with backdrop of modern Riyadh or Saudi city skyline emerging from low morning fog clouds, soft golden dawn light, distant skyscrapers visible through mist, peaceful epic atmosphere, shot on 35mm at f/8, no text, no watermark, no people in foreground {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: generic Western city skyline
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: T31. Saudi adaptation guidance: Default Riyadh skyline (Kingdom Tower, PIF tower, Mukaab) rather than generic 'modern city'. Jeddah brands: Jeddah Tower and coastal context. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1 per quarter.
